text: Hey, I really loved your talk today. The unified gateway concept is exactly what we need in the industry.
Thanks, Romeo. I have actually read your blog posts about microservice mesh architectures. Really innovative stuff.
What if we could combine our approaches? Your enterprise schema translation with our lightweight mesh routing?
That would be incredible. But our companies would never approve a formal collaboration.
Romeo! Come on, the karaoke machine is free. Leave the architecture talk for Monday.
